name: Tenderizing Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup A1 steak sauce (5 oz bottle)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the marinade over and stab into a thick economy beef roast, such as a 7-bone roast that is at least 1 1/2 inches thick.
2. Marinate the roast for at least overnight to allow the flavors to penetrate deeply.
3. Before serving, scrape off any excess marinade from the surface of the meat.
